acceptanceCriteria: The same validated input deterministically returns the same bounded escalation decision
Policy, human-decision, budget, and infrastructure stops precede candidate selection
Adjacent and direct escalation use eligible candidates only and record exclusions
Legacy escalation v1 remains accepted and new decision evidence is append-only
constraints: Do not modify or weaken existing acceptance tests
Do not persist raw logs or secrets
Treat runtime identity, reasoning effort, tokens, and provider cost as unavailable
stopConditions: a required check fails twice without a new hypothesis
